description: Canonical Qeet ID Copilot tool catalog. Loaded by the Go orchestrator (go:embed → Anthropic `tools` defs) and by the frontend tool-registry (which attaches run()). Names are the contract; a qa parity test asserts both sides match. Adding a tool = edit this file + a frontend run() + the backend needs no code change.

tools.name: search_users
tools.title: Search users
tools.description: Search users in the current tenant by free-text query and/or status. Returns a redacted list of users (id, email, name, status). Read-only.

tools.name: create_user
tools.title: Create user
tools.description: Create a new user in a tenant. Optionally assign an initial role. If no password is given, the user is created for invitation/passwordless onboarding.

role_id.description: Optional role to assign on creation.

tools.name: update_user
tools.title: Update user
tools.description: Update a user's mutable profile fields (currently display name).

tools.name: disable_user
tools.title: Disable user
tools.description: Suspend a user, immediately blocking their sign-in. Reversible with enable_user. Destructive: requires confirmation.

tools.name: enable_user
tools.title: Enable user
tools.description: Re-activate a suspended user, restoring their ability to sign in.

tools.name: delete_user
tools.title: Delete user
tools.description: Soft-delete a user. Destructive: requires confirmation and shows the affected user before proceeding.

tools.name: reset_user_mfa
tools.title: Reset user MFA
tools.description: Remove a user's enrolled MFA factors, forcing re-enrollment at next sign-in. Use when a user has lost their device. Destructive: requires confirmation. (There is no admin endpoint to ENABLE a specific factor for another user — MFA enrollment is a self-scoped ceremony.)

tools.name: create_organization
tools.title: Create organization
tools.description: Create a new organization (tenant).

slug.description: Optional URL slug; derived from name if omitted.

tools.name: create_role
tools.title: Create role
tools.description: Create a role in the current tenant. Permissions are granted separately with grant_permission.

tools.name: assign_role
tools.title: Assign role to user
tools.description: Assign an existing role to a user within the current tenant.

tools.name: grant_permission
tools.title: Grant permission to role
tools.description: Grant a permission to a role. Broadens what every user holding the role can do.

tools.name: set_strict_mfa
tools.title: Set strict MFA
tools.description: Toggle strict MFA for the tenant by disabling adaptive device-remembering (remember_device_enabled). When strict, every sign-in must complete MFA with no adaptive skip.

tools.name: create_oauth_client
tools.title: Create OAuth client
tools.description: Register a new OAuth/OIDC client application. Confidential clients return a client_secret exactly once — it is shown to the operator only and is never sent to the model.

tools.name: rotate_oauth_client_secret
tools.title: Rotate OAuth client secret
tools.description: Rotate a confidential OAuth client's secret. The old secret stops working. The new secret is shown to the operator once and never sent to the model. Destructive: requires confirmation.

tools.name: rotate_signing_keys
tools.title: Rotate signing keys
tools.description: Rotate the tenant's OIDC token-signing keys. The current key is invalidated after the grace window. Returns key material shown to the operator only, never to the model. Destructive: requires confirmation.

tools.name: search_audit_logs
tools.title: Search audit logs
tools.description: Search the tenant's append-only audit log by free-text, action, resource type, and/or actor. Read-only.

tools.name: search_sessions
tools.title: List sessions
tools.description: List active sessions for the current principal. Note: this endpoint is self-scoped — there is no admin cross-user session search — so it returns the calling operator's own sessions only.

tools.name: simulate_authorization
tools.title: Simulate authorization
tools.description: Evaluate whether a subject may perform an action on a resource using a chosen decision engine (AuthZEN/ABAC/RBAC/ReBAC). Returns the decision plus an explain trace. Read-only — nothing is changed.

subject.description: Subject identifier or attributes, per engine.

tools.name: generate_terraform
tools.title: Generate Terraform
tools.description: Generate Terraform (HCL) for an existing resource by reading its live configuration. Client-side templating; nothing is applied.

tools.name: generate_sdk_snippet
tools.title: Generate SDK snippet
tools.description: Generate a client code snippet (curl/TypeScript/Go/Python) for a known Qeet ID endpoint. Informational; client-side.

tools.name: generate_api_example
tools.title: Generate API example
tools.description: Generate an example request/response for a Qeet ID endpoint derived from its OpenAPI shape. Informational; client-side.
